top_signals.title: Putin Acknowledges Russia Faces Fuel Supply Problems
top_signals.summary: President Vladimir Putin said Russia continues to face a fuel supply squeeze as the Kremlin weighs measures to stabilize the domestic market following refinery outages.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Russia used social engineering to breach prominent messaging accounts, Ukraine says
top_signals.summary: Ukraine's SBU described a long-running Russian operation that used fake tech-support workers to persuade people to hand over credentials to their messaging apps.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
